title: pavonia kearneyi
intro: Pavonia kearneyi, also known as Kearney's Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae), native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia kearneyi include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
